user.title: Set up RAV311 Remote
user.description: Select the infrared transmitter pointed at your Yamaha receiver (RX-V361, RX-V361BL, HTR-6030, HTR-6025).

abort.already_configured: This transmitter is already configured for a RAV311 Remote.
abort.no_emitters: No infrared transmitter found. Set up an ESPHome IR proxy first.
